headline: A Look At CrowdStrike (CRWD) Valuation After Mizuho Upgrade And AI Cybersecurity Momentum
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD) just caught investors’ attention after Mizuho upgraded the stock to Outperform, citing demand, expanding growth drivers, and leadership in AI-focused cybersecurity solutions. See our latest analysis for CrowdStrike Holdings. The share price sits at US$454.61 after a 1-day share price return of 1.45% and a 7-day share price return of 4.95%, reflecting fresh interest following the upgrade and recent AI-focused product launches. headline: Midday Fly By: Verizon reports ‘beat and raise,’ Shell to acquire ARC
summary: The major averages were broadly lower amid stalled peace negotiations between the U.S. and Iran as well as new escalation in the Strait of Hormuz. Investors are also balancing continued strength in corporate earnings and AI-driven optimism with rising geopolitical tension and macro uncertainty.
